title: huperzia reflexa var. minor
intro: Huperzia reflexa var. minor, also known as Thuidium delicatulum or Thuidium minor, is a species of moss that belongs to the family Thuidiaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its potential medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Huperzia reflexa var. minor include its ability to support respiratory health, boost immune function, and exhibit antioxidant properties. In terms of herbal preparations, it is often used in the form of infusions, teas, or capsules, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety for human consumption.
